name: Banana Chocolate Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, vanilla extract, melted chocolate chips, and mashed bananas to the creamed mixture. Mix thoroughly.
4. Drop by large spoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 400°F for 12-15 minutes.
